title: ワンダフル☆ミステイク！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm walking through a field, when...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Pandorea ☆ pandorana! Paphiopedilum ☆
insigne!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
O sparrow! I bless you with the power of Mother
Nature. Rise, and become a phoenix! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear Sweep Tosho chanting some kind of spell...
but nothing in particular happens after she
finishes.
choice_data_list: I heard something about a phoenix?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you interested in my magic?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Then I'll let you watch. I'm in the middle
of some transformation practi—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! The sparrow I was practicing on! It's
gone...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Urgh... It took me an entire hour to find it...
choice_data_list: How about I teach you a cool spell instead?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: A cool spell? Ooh, what's the incantation?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spout off random terms that sound impressive
enough—specifically, the names of the special
symbols websites require you to include in
passwords.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Semicolon! Apostrophe! Circumflex accent!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that sounds super powerful... What does it
do?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! I'm gonna go try it out on someone in the
hallway!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho leaves, glowing with high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's do it! Once we find it, I can show you
my transformation spell!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ah, there it is! Okay...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Protea ☆ longifolia! Paphiopedilum ☆ callosum!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
O sparrow! I bless you with the power of Mother
Nature. Rise, and become a phoenix! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Once again, nothing happens.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?! Whyyy?! Why didn't it work?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho continues recasting her spell until
the day grows old and the sun goes down... but
the sparrow unfortunately remains a sparrow.
